cv.name: Nándor Dudás
cv.bio: I am an enthusiast web developer and cat owner. I fell in love with software development and it does not change. Outside of programming, I enjoy doing photography and cycling. Dreaming up ideas and making them come true is where my passion lies. This sentence is for reading purposes only.

skill_list.first: I am Windows user originally, but using WSL and if possible I am using Linux. I am not perfect, but mate I am try to being better with every problems what is try to resolve.
skill_list.second: I think "less is more". As you can see, this is a short tale about myself, but the tales sometimes become a reality. Let’s get in touch with each other and write our common story.
skill_list.third: This is just a small piece about me, please contact me for more information. You know my name, phone and email address 👏
